subject: Range of CTF and Motion for tilt-series pre-processing
body:
Hi, all. I have a simple question. When I do the CTF and motion for 
tilt-series pre-processing. I didn't know how to specify the range of CTF 
and motion (in Ny or A). The result values of estimated resolution and 
defocus, in my opinion, may be a little bad. The detector was K3 and the 
pixel size was 2.1A. 

The settings was in the picture. And I wanted to know whether I should 
change the parameter(CTF range / Motion Consider / weight with B / Models, 
spacially these four, I thought.)
